prompt: A 2D flat comic animation style classroom scene, bright and tidy, matching the exact character designs of Journey to the West characters in a modern school setting. Tang Seng (a Buddhist monk in red and gold robes with a monk hat) stands behind a wooden podium on the left side of the blackboard. There are four students sitting at individual wooden desks. CRUCIAL: The camera is positioned behind the students. All four students have their backs turned to the camera, facing the green blackboard directly. From left to right: Sun Wukong (monkey boy, tiger skin skirt), Zhu Bajie (chubby pig boy), Sha Seng (dark hair, golden headband), and Xiaobailong (boy with white dragon horns). The classroom has windows on the left and a wooden door on the right. The green blackboard is mostly blank with large empty spaces. White chalk text on the blackboard exactly as follows: In the center '向量斗法课堂：基底法入门'. In the top left corner '主讲：唐三藏'. In the top right corner '目标：解决向量综合题'. Clear outlines, no distortion, stable perspective.
